summary: Rebuilt queryDigestTopDomains: dropped the duplicate unfiltered query, added the missing err guard, defer rows.Close, results slice, and rows.Next/Scan loop.
reason: An in-flight edit left two consecutive `rows, err := db.QueryContext(...)` declarations (the redeclare won't compile) and stripped the Scan loop, so the package did not build and the `digest` command was unreachable.
